intended_use: syngo.via RT Image Suite is a 3D and 4D image visualization, multi-modality manipulation and contouring tool that helps the preparation of treatments such as, but not limited to those performed with r
intended_use_full: syngo.via RT Image Suite is a 3D and 4D image visualization, multi-modality manipulation and contouring tool that helps the preparation of treatments such as, but not limited to those performed with radiation (for example, Brachytherapy, Particle Therapy, External Beam Radiation Therapy). It provides tools to view existing contours, create, edit, modify, copy contours of regions of the body, such as but not limited to, skin outline, targets and organs-at-risk. It also provides functionalities to create simple geometric treatment plans.
target_condition: Lung ventilation assessment and tumor/organ-at-risk segmentation in radiation therapy patients
ground_truth: For AI segmentation: annotated lung lobes on CT scans; For clinical validation: literature-based expected ventilation distribution and spirometry (PFT) measurements for vital capacity correlation
other_metrics: Mean DICE of 0.92 for lung lobe segmentation across test set; Pearson correlation R = 0.63 (p < 0.001) between ventilation algorithm and spirometry vital capacity measurement
